request: Analyze the correlation between employee tenure and sales performance.
search_document:
User Request: Analyze the correlation between employee tenure and sales performance.

Dashboard Components:
Title: Employee Tenure vs Sales Performance
Type: scatter_plot
Description: Correlation between employee tenure and total sales
Title: Sales by Employee
Type: bar_chart
Description: Total sales generated by each employee
Title: Average Employee Tenure
Type: kpi
Description: Average tenure of employees in years
Title: Sales Performance Over Time
Type: line_chart
Description: Sales performance trend over time
Title: Employee Distribution by Tenure
Type: pie_chart
Description: Distribution of employees based on tenure ranges

sql_queries.title: Employee Tenure vs Sales Performance
sql_queries.description: Correlation between employee tenure and total sales
sql_queries.sql: SELECT e.EmployeeID, e.FirstName || ' ' || e.LastName AS EmployeeName, (julianday('now') - julianday(e.HireDate)) / 365.25 AS TenureYears, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalSales FROM Employees e JOIN Orders o ON e.EmployeeID = o.EmployeeID JOIN 'Order Details' od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID GROUP BY e.EmployeeID

sql_queries.title: Sales by Employee
sql_queries.description: Total sales generated by each employee
sql_queries.sql: SELECT e.EmployeeID, e.FirstName || ' ' || e.LastName AS EmployeeName, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalSales FROM Employees e JOIN Orders o ON e.EmployeeID = o.EmployeeID JOIN 'Order Details' od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID GROUP BY e.EmployeeID ORDER BY TotalSales DESC

sql_queries.title: Average Employee Tenure
sql_queries.description: Average tenure of employees in years
sql_queries.sql: SELECT AVG((julianday('now') - julianday(HireDate)) / 365.25) AS AverageTenureYears FROM Employees

sql_queries.title: Sales Performance Over Time
sql_queries.sql: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', o.OrderDate) AS YearMonth, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalSales FROM Orders o JOIN 'Order Details' od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID GROUP BY YearMonth ORDER BY YearMonth

sql_queries.title: Employee Distribution by Tenure
sql_queries.description: Distribution of employees based on tenure ranges
sql_queries.sql: SELECT CASE WHEN TenureYears < 1 THEN '< 1 year' WHEN TenureYears BETWEEN 1 AND 3 THEN '1-3 years' WHEN TenureYears BETWEEN 3 AND 5 THEN '3-5 years' ELSE '> 5 years' END AS TenureRange, COUNT(*) AS EmployeeCount FROM (SELECT (julianday('now') - julianday(HireDate)) / 365.25 AS TenureYears FROM Employees) GROUP BY TenureRange
